description.value:
Generic trucks are an alternative to compacts, trading 2 seats and a smaller size for higher durability and the ability to haul cargo. Up to 4 people can sit in the truck bed while the truck moves, but must make a DV15 Endurance check for trips which are longer than 20 minutes/more than one district - upon failure, they become fatigued (-2 to all actions) until they can rest (amount of rest proportional to the length of the trip, obviously).

Otherwise, they use the stats of a normal compact.

Tokens and Art by reddragon8928 on Discord. Redistributed with permission.
